name: forge_config
description: Run every typed-config gate at once: manifest (phases.toml + backends.toml), privacy (privacy.toml), trust-safety, domains, forms, federation, email, commerce, memberships, audit-log. Each gate validates its TOML/JSON config against its `*-core` typed surface. Use this before deploy to catch config drift. Returns a per-gate status + failure detail.

json.description: Emit JSON instead of human-readable text.
